title: Crunchy Japanese Bacon Crumble
description: A rich, crispy, indulgent Japanese dish featuring bacon, tempered with a touch of sweetness and served as an accompaniment to rice or noodles.

ingredients.name: Brown Sugar
ingredients.notes: ensure it is whole cane or coconut sugar to maintain a whole30-friendly profile

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: for frying and tempering the bacon

instructions: Slice bacon into thin strips, season with salt.
In a skillet over medium heat, fry bacon until golden brown, removing from heat when almost crispy.
Combine brown sugar and vegetable oil in a small saucepan, stir until the sugar dissolves. Pour over fried bacon and toss to coat evenly.
Transfer bacon mixture to a baking dish lined with parchment paper. Bake for about 10 minutes or until it reaches desired crispiness.
While the bacon is baking, mix panko crumbs with a pinch of salt. After removing from oven, sprinkle crispy bacon onto crumb mixture and toss gently to evenly coat.
Serve immediately as a snack accompaniment.
